text:
Autor:Nicoleta Nicolau

Publicat:19-06-202419-06-2024

Actualizat:19-06-202419-06-2024

Sursă foto:Tarom

"On the occasion of the Paris Olympic Games, TAROM renamed the aircraft that will carry the Romanian athletes to the French capital Nadia Comaneci, the most successful Romanian gymnast of all time. Nadia Comaneci's name and autograph were affixed to the TAROM Boeing 737-800 aircraft, named previously "Sarmizegetuza", in honor of the holder of five gold medals at the Olympic Games, in 1976 and 1980, and the record for the first score of 10 in the history of gymnastics, in Montreal," the press release states.TheTAROMcompany is a traditional partner of the Romanian Olympic team and will fly the "tricolors" again this year at the Olympic Games in Paris, which will take place between July 26 and August 11, 2024."It is an honor to always be close to my country and Romanian sports. Good luck at the Olympic Games in Paris!" Nadia Comaneci told the Romanian athletes.This is the first aircraft in the TAROM fleet to be named after a Romanian athlete.Nadia Comaneci and TAROM concluded a partnership, through which the name of the famous gymnast will be associated with a B737-800 aircraft from the company's fleet.The National Romanian Air Transport Company -TAROMwas founded in 1954 and operates under the authority of the Ministry of Transport, being a member of the SkyTeam Alliance since June 25, 2010.TAROM owns a fleet of 18 aircraft and has in its portfolio a number of 70 destinations operated with its own aircraft or served by its code share partners. Since 1993, TAROM has been a member company of the International Air Transport Association (IATA).

Exclusivități și documente incendiare.Echipa stiripesurse.ro vă prezintă ştirile din spatele ştirilor.

title: TAROM aircraft to carry Romanian athletes to Olympic Games in Paris, renamed Nadia Comaneci - Stiripesurse
